name: wa-api-notify
description: Lightweight Node.js library for sending WhatsApp messages, images, and documents via the waapi.fyas.my.id API

scripts.test: node -e "const { sendMessage, createClient } = require('./index.cjs'); if (typeof createClient !== 'function') { throw new Error('createClient missing (CJS)'); } console.log('CJS OK');" && node --input-type=module -e "import { sendMessage, createClient } from './index.mjs'; if (typeof createClient !== 'function') { throw new Error('createClient missing (ESM)'); } console.log('ESM OK');"

author: KiroFyzu
